phase_1_agents.name: performance-agent
phase_1_agents.description: Covers GA4, Google Ads, Google Shopping, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, X. Produces spend/ROAS/POAS/CAC analysis plus Shopping impression share and channel anomalies.

phase_1_agents.name: crm-lifecycle-agent
phase_1_agents.description: Covers email/CRM platform. Tracks cart abandonment, recovery, email revenue, churn signals, and repeat purchase patterns.

phase_1_agents.name: reputation-agent
phase_1_agents.description: Covers Trustpilot and Google Business. Monitors review count, sentiment, response rate, and trust risk signals.

phase_1_agents.name: marketing-ops-agent
phase_1_agents.description: Covers GA4 data integrity, KPI sanity, campaign QA, tracking quality, and coupon dependency monitoring.

phase_1_agents.name: cross-channel-brief-agent
phase_1_agents.description: Synthesis agent. Reads outputs from all four specialist agents and produces the daily marketing team brief and executive summary.

utility_agents.name: translation-agent
utility_agents.description: On-demand translation specialist. Translates agent outputs, reports, Teams messages, email briefs, and user queries between English, Serbian (SR), and Macedonian (MK). Includes automatic language detection. Used by cross-channel-brief-agent for multilingual output and by the chat interface to respond in the user's language.

phase_2_agents.name: customer-segmentation-agent
phase_2_agents.description: RFM segmentation, LTV prediction, and churn risk scoring. Outputs customer distribution across VIP/Active/At-Risk/Churned/New segments and weekly drift. Enables targeted CRM actions and reduces coupon dependency by identifying who actually needs an incentive.

phase_2_agents.name: pricing-intelligence-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Monitors competitor prices on comparable products across regional marketplaces (eMAG, Cenoteka, Amazon.de). Outputs price position score per category, identifies margin-safe repricing windows, and detects competitor promotions. Directly supports promo-simulator and Google Shopping bid strategy.

phase_2_agents.name: search-merchandising-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Monitors internal site search quality: zero-result rate, failed search sessions (searched then bounced), top queries with poor product match, and search-to-conversion funnel. Identifies catalog gaps and surfaces highest-impact merchandising fixes.

phase_2_agents.name: listing-content-quality-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Scans 250k catalog for missing images, thin descriptions, missing attributes (size/color/brand/material), and composite quality score. Prioritizes fixes by GMV impact. Covers all surfaces -- site search, category pages, conversion -- not just Shopping feed.

phase_2_agents.name: competitor-intelligence-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Lightweight competitor monitoring using free/existing sources: Meta Ad Library (active creatives, estimated spend), Google Auction Insights (impression share vs named competitors), and public review ratings. Weekly strategic summary plus daily promotion detection.

phase_2_agents.name: organic-merchandising-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Search Console, Ahrefs, product feed quality, catalog indexation, category SEO.

phase_2_agents.name: category-growth-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Most important marketplace-specific agent. Ranks categories by revenue, margin, return risk, and demand trend. Identifies which categories to scale, monitor, or fix.

phase_2_agents.name: supplier-intelligence-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Identifies suppliers with high revenue potential but low marketing investment. Suggests co-marketing campaigns.

phase_2_agents.name: demand-forecasting-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Detects demand spikes from search trends, internal search, category views, and seasonal patterns. Alerts marketing before demand peaks.

phase_2_agents.name: promo-simulator-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Pre-launch promo impact estimator. Given a proposed discount and category, outputs expected GMV lift, margin impact, and break-even volume.

phase_2_agents.name: product-feed-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Scans 250k+ product catalog for missing attributes, poor titles/descriptions, Shopping feed readiness, and listing quality issues.

phase_2_agents.name: influencer-partnership-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Tracks influencer campaign ROI, creator scoring, and co-marketing opportunity detection.

phase_2_agents.name: traditional-media-correlation-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Correlates offline campaign dates (TV, OOH, Radio) with branded search lift, direct traffic, and GMV signals.

phase_2_agents.name: employer-branding-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Monitors LinkedIn employer presence, recruiter engagement, talent pipeline visibility.

phase_2_agents.name: meeting-intelligence-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Processes meeting transcripts via Whisper, generates structured summaries, extracts action items, creates Jira tasks.

phase_2_agents.name: knowledge-retrieval-agent
phase_2_agents.description: Searches Confluence, campaign docs, experiment archive, and meeting summaries for institutional memory retrieval.

phase_3_agents.name: anomaly-detection-agent
phase_3_agents.description: Near-real-time monitoring for business metric anomalies not covered by specialist agents: sudden GMV drops, unusual return rate spikes by supplier/category, order volume anomalies, payment failure rate spikes, conversion collapse. Requires event-triggered architecture beyond the current batch-cron stack.
phase_3_agents.note: Requires real-time data pipeline beyond current batch cron. Build after Phase 2 infrastructure is mature.

phase_3_agents.name: attribution-mmm-agent
phase_3_agents.description: Marketing mix modeling and incrementality testing. Measures true incremental revenue per channel, accounts for coupon attribution errors and cross-channel touchpoints. Directly solves the coupon dependency attribution problem.
phase_3_agents.note: Requires 12+ months of clean tagged data. Groundwork (event tagging, coupon flags) should be laid in Phase 1-2.
